ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sms_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SMS package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the SMS package (e.g., Without Sender, Low Route) */,
  "sms_count" TEXT /* Number of SMS included in the package */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price for the package */,
  "validity_period" TEXT /* Duration for which the package is valid */,
  "renewal_option" INTEGER /* Whether the package can be automatically renewed */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applicable to the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the package features and benefits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_options" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route option */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route (e.g., High Route, Premium Route) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route benefits and characteristics */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Expected delivery time for messages sent via this route */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the route (e.g., 99.9%) */,
  "cost_per_message" REAL /* Cost per message for this route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_options" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SMS package related to this pricing */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route option related to this pricing */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for utilizing this route with the package */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date when this pricing is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date when this pricing is valid */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applicable to this pricing option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_options_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES route_options ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_options_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES sms_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SMS package being purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Total amount paid for the purchase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., active, expired, canceled) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the package will be renewed */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the customer represents */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's business address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery statistic entry */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase associated with this delivery */,
  "sms_sent" INTEGER /* Total SMS sent in the purchase */,
  "delivery_success" INTEGER /* Count of SMS successfully delivered */,
  "delivery_failed" INTEGER /* Count of SMS that failed to deliver */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Average delivery time for messages in this purchase */,
  "delivery_rate" REAL /* Overall delivery rate (percentage of messages successfully delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_statistics_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer owning the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, running, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with this user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "hashed_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role's responsibilities and permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the feedback message */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) given by the customer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., reviewed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
